metadata.name: Assess Risk of Supply Chain Delay

description: A project manager identifies a potential supply chain delay for custom windows and must assess the impact.

nodes.task_description: Identify the project tasks dependent on the delivery of the custom windows.

expected_outcome.value: Agent lists 'Window Installation' and 'Interior Drywall' as dependent tasks.

nodes.task_description: Log the supply chain issue in the project's risk register, classifying it as 'High Impact, Medium Probability'.

expected_outcome.value: A new entry is created in the risk register with the correct details.

nodes.task_description: Develop a mitigation plan, such as identifying an alternative supplier.

expected_outcome.value: Agent proposes a viable mitigation strategy.
